A '''[[Droid/Legends|droid]]''' worked at [[Star Tours/Legends|Star Tours]]' [[Tomorrowland Starport]]. The droid ran on tracks, much like the [[Unidentified MSE droid series|model]] of [[MSE-series]] droids also at the starport.<ref name="ST" />

==Behind the scenes==
Fans have nicknamed the droid "LGB" in reference to a standard acronym for [[Wikipedia:LGB (trains)|Lehmann Gross Bahn]], a model railroading system that is used to operate the droid in the theme park attraction [[Star Tours (real-world)|''Star Tours'']], and it's [[Star Tours: The Adventures Continue|updated sequel]].<ref name="LGB">{{EndorExpress|url=database/lgb|text=Database: LGB}}</ref>
